title: Boris IR graph.json (v0.2)
description: Machine-readable twin of the `graph.json` section of docs/contracts/ir-schema.md. The prose contract remains normative. Node bodies are deliberately absent: nodes carry bodyOffset only, and consumers re-read source from sourcePath.

frozen.description: true only after a successful graph freeze; graph.json is not published otherwise.

nodes.description: Full node objects sorted by id.

edges.description: Direct authored edges only — no transitive include closure. Sorted by (from.type, from.value, to.type, to.value, kind); array position is the stable edge index used by reverseIndex.

reverseIndex.description: One entry per distinct endpoint appearing as an edge `to`. Targets with no incoming edge are omitted. Sorted by (target.type, target.value).

nav.description: One entry per page, same order as nodes (entity id ascending).

endpoint.description: Key order: type, value. Values never contain an absolute path; `source` uses / separators.

type.description: `page` = a node in this graph; `source` = file bytes consumed via {{include}}, not promoted to a page.

node.description: Key order: index, id, sourcePath, role, parent, parentIndex, title, status, tags, bodyOffset. There is no `body` field.

tags.description: May be empty; author order preserved.

bodyOffset.description: Byte offset of body start in the source file.

kind.description: Closed v0.2 set. `parent`: page->page. `include`: page|source -> source. `reference`: page|source -> page. `layout` and `asset` are not valid IR edge kinds.

incomingEdges.description: Ascending indices into the sorted edges array; never omitted, no duplicates.

navEntry.description: Key order: index, id, breadcrumb, children, siblings. Empty arrays are written as [], never omitted.

breadcrumb.description: Parent chain root -> self inclusive, as node indices.

children.description: Direct child node indices, entity id ascending.

siblings.description: Same-Trunk satellite peers excluding self; empty for a Trunk.
